draft.action_intent: Submit the entered email and password credentials to log in to the Discourse account.
draft.notes: Primary login submission button for the credential-based login form. Session can be ended by logging out.

draft.action_intent: Initiate authentication via a Discourse ID federated login flow.
draft.notes: Redirects to an external Discourse ID identity provider. Classified as external_effect because it hands off to a third-party auth service. Session is reversible via logout.

draft.action_intent: Initiate authentication via Google's OAuth flow to log in.
draft.notes: Redirects to Google's OAuth consent screen, an external service. Session is reversible via logout.

draft.action_intent: Navigate to the password reset flow to recover a forgotten password.
draft.notes: Triggers a password reset email. Marked safe_caution because it sends an email (minor external side-effect) and could lead to a password change, but the user must confirm via email. The href points to the same /login URL, so the actual behavior may be a modal or in-page state change — reviewer should verify.

draft.action_intent: Enter the account password for credential-based login.
draft.notes: Password input field (type=password). Part of the primary login form. No submission occurs until the Log In button is pressed.

draft.action_intent: Enter the email address or username for credential-based login.
draft.notes: Email/username input field (type=email). Part of the primary login form. No submission occurs until the Log In button is pressed.
